question: Model a `Library` class that maintains a collection of `Book` objects (from a previous question) using aggregation. Implement methods to `addBook()`, `removeBook()`, and `listAllBooks()`.

test_cases.input: Simulated operations: Add three unique books, Attempt to add a duplicate book (should fail), List all books, Remove an existing book, List all books, Attempt to remove a non-existent book (should fail), List all books, Remove the last remaining book, List all books.
test_cases.expected:
--- Adding Books ---
Added 'The Hobbit': Yes
Added 'The Lord of the Rings': Yes
Added 'Pride and Prejudice': Yes

--- Attempting to Add a Duplicate Book ---
Attempted to add duplicate 'The Hobbit (2nd Copy)': No

--- Listing All Books (after adding and duplicate attempt) ---
Books in the library:
- "The Hobbit" by J.R.R. Tolkien (ISBN: 978-0-345-33968-3)
- "The Lord of the Rings" by J.R.R. Tolkien (ISBN: 978-0-618-05326-7)
- "Pride and Prejudice" by Jane Austen (ISBN: 978-0-141-43951-8)

--- Removing 'The Lord of the Rings' (ISBN 978-0-618-05326-7) ---
Removed 'The Lord of the Rings': Yes

--- Listing All Books (after removal) ---
Books in the library:
- "The Hobbit" by J.R.R. Tolkien (ISBN: 978-0-345-33968-3)
- "Pride and Prejudice" by Jane Austen (ISBN: 978-0-141-43951-8)

--- Attempting to Remove a Non-Existent Book ---
Removed non-existent book (ISBN 978-999-999-999-9): No

--- Listing All Books (after failed removal) ---
Books in the library:
- "The Hobbit" by J.R.R. Tolkien (ISBN: 978-0-345-33968-3)
- "Pride and Prejudice" by Jane Austen (ISBN: 978-0-141-43951-8)

--- Removing 'The Hobbit' ---
Removed 'The Hobbit': Yes

--- Listing All Books (final) ---
Books in the library:
- "Pride and Prejudice" by Jane Austen (ISBN: 978-0-141-43951-8)
